name: Valerie Foushee
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $3,362,373 for Valerie Foushee in U.S. House, NC-04. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
